overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The journey progresses from covered sidewalks with vending machines, through an open plaza and street crossing, under highway overpasses with digital billboards, through a narrow green-lit alleyway, and finally into an open street with steam vents and vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with food vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing food vending machines and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright pink hair walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: row of blue and yellow automated food dispensers with glowing displays
illuminated signs advertising various food items above the vending machines
large structural pillars painted red supporting the overhead walkway
elevated pedestrian bridge or building overhang creating partial cover

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered city sidewalk at night, illuminated by vibrant neon signs. The character walks past a row of food vending machines on the right, while red structural columns line the left side. Other pedestrians walk in the same direction, including one with distinctive pink hair, creating a moderately busy urban atmosphere typical of a cyberpunk city.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with outdoor dining area

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with outdoor seating and white umbrellas
character and crowd cross the street as vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza and then crossing the street with a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past the crosswalk as pedestrians cross

entered.detail: large white patio umbrellas shading outdoor dining tables
large illuminated sign with Japanese characters and neon rainbow arches
red and gray paved street with crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open plaza featuring white outdoor dining umbrellas. The environment transitions from enclosed to open, revealing large neon building signs including a prominent 'TENGU' sign with rainbow arches. The character then crosses a city street with other pedestrians as a white sedan drives past, moving from the sheltered walkway to the exposed urban intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway underpass with digital advertising displays

agents.ego_description: walking under the highway overpass, passing large digital billboards and concrete support pillars

notable_agents.action: man wearing a Tom's Diner vest walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red structural steel beams forming the underside of the highway overpass
massive illuminated screen displaying advertisements on the left wall
concrete pillar with 'Ellison' street sign in red and white

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive highway overpass characterized by red structural beams overhead. Large digital billboards illuminate the left side of the walkway, while concrete pillars line the path. The environment is more industrial and less crowded than the previous plaza, with vehicles visible on the street to the left and sparse pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor approaching narrow service alley

events.description: enters narrow dark alleyway with green neon floor lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a narrow alleyway, passing other pedestrians near the entrance

notable_agents.action: man in tank top and red cap walking toward the camera

entered.detail: metal gate marking the entrance to a narrow service alley
vertical green neon tubes illuminating the alley entrance
closed corrugated metal security shutters on storefronts

segments.scene_description: The character continues under the overpass toward a narrow alley entrance marked by green neon lights. The space becomes increasingly enclosed as the character approaches the alley gate, with metal roll-up doors lining the right side. The lighting dims significantly as the character transitions from the open underpass to the confined alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial service alley with green neon floor strips

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow dark alley, following the green neon path toward the exit

entered.detail: continuous strips of green neon light embedded in the floor running down the alley center
dark walls covered in graffiti and industrial piping
steam or fog rising from vents near the alley exit

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, dark industrial alley illuminated only by green neon strips running along the floor. The walls are covered in graffiti and industrial pipes, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere. Steam rises from vents near the far end of the alley where light indicates the exit, with no other pedestrians present in this enclosed service corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street with steam vents and neon storefronts

events.description: exits narrow alley into open street with visible steam rising from ground vents
steam becomes denser, creating atmospheric fog effect near the ground

agents.ego_description: emerging from the alley and exploring the open street, observing the neon signs and steam-filled atmosphere

entered.detail: vibrant pink and cyan neon signs outlining building entrances
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking off part of the street
high-rise glass and steel towers with illuminated windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dark alley into an open urban street filled with atmospheric steam rising from ground vents. The scene features vibrant pink and blue neon signs, construction barricades, and a view of towering futuristic skyscrapers in the distance. The lighting shifts from the green-dominated alley to a mix of pink, blue, and purple neon, creating a classic cyberpunk street atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a sheltered sidewalk into an open plaza and finally beneath a heavy industrial overpass. It begins on a covered walkway illuminated by vibrant signs, moving past a row of food vending machines and red structural columns amidst a flow of pedestrians. As the character emerges from the shelter, the environment opens into a wide plaza featuring white dining umbrellas and prominent rainbow-arched signage before crossing a busy city street. The scene then shifts toward a more industrial atmosphere as the camera moves beneath a massive highway overpass characterized by red overhead beams and concrete pillars. Finally, the view expands along a walkway lined with large digital billboards while vehicles pass by on the adjacent street.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim urban underpass through a claustrophobic industrial corridor and into a vibrant, neon-lit city street. It begins as the character moves toward a narrow alley entrance, where the open space of the overpass rapidly gives way to enclosed metal roll-up doors and fading light. As the character enters the alley, the environment shifts into a dark, graffiti-covered service corridor illuminated only by green neon strips and punctuated by rising steam. The scene then opens up as the character exits the confinement of the alley, transitioning from the green glow into a wide street filled with atmospheric steam and construction barricades. Finally, the lighting transforms into a vivid palette of pink, blue, and purple neon beneath the silhouette of towering futuristic skyscrapers.
